steps.title: Recognize what the goal requires
steps.content: The student wants to provide an example of an air mass — a specific instance, not a general explanation of the system. The notes include examples: cA (continental arctic, dry and cold) and mT (maritime tropical, moist and warm).

steps.title: Find the choice that provides the example
steps.content: Choice D provides the specific example of cA, which is continental arctic because it is dry and cold. Choices A, B, and C discuss the definition, classification system, or origins instead of providing a concrete example. This matches choice D — D is correct.
